creator: leehsin@163.com
text:
hi,

I am a bank employee, I am not a computer professional nor do I understand what FreeBSD is, I have been receiving various emails from the FreeBSD.org mailing list continuously for almost 6 years now, and I am now determined to solve this problem with the help of my friends, as no anti-spam measures on my mailbox are working, I have almost tens of thousands of emails in my mailbox about There are also many emails from mailing lists that only FreeBSD committers can subscribe to, and I am not a FreeBSD committer. I send unsubscribes to these mailing lists, and the automatic reply says that I am not subscribed to these emails. This is causing a lot of problems in my life at work, and this email is my work email. Please take care of this as soon as possible, thank you very much. My email address is leehsin@163.com. Please remove me from any mailing lists about FreeBSD, I would be very grateful!


--------------------
Return-Path: <dev-commits-src-all+bounces-18922-mygoodfrien=gmail.com@freebsd.org>
-------------------

leehsin@163.com
